title: Spooky Halloween Pumpkin Coloring Page
seoTitle: Spooky Halloween Pumpkin Jack-O'-Lantern Coloring Page
seoDescription: Get ready for autumn with this spooky Halloween jack-o'-lantern pumpkin coloring page. Free high-res PDF print file.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Pumpkins are actually fruits (berries), not vegetables, belonging to the same family as cucumbers and melons.
Designed for Hard difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing contrasting color schemes using dual-brush markers.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about geometric symmetry and relaxing design while developing fine motor coordination.
